completion:
[1] Tell Me About Yourself
Tell Me About Yourself is a 2022 Mexican coming-of-age comedy-drama film written and directed by Eduardo Cortés in his directorial debut. Starring Germán Bracco, Martín Saracho, Arcelia Ramírez and Julio Bracho. It premiered on October 6, 2022 in Mexican theaters.
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tell_Me_About_Yourself
